mainLift.desc: Build force with control. Own posture and bar path on every working set.
mainLift.prompt: Top set, reps, weight, how it felt

secondaryLift.desc: Support the main lift with strict execution. No sloppy reps.

assistance.desc: Finish the body with honest accessory work. No lazy effort.
assistance.prompt: What got done? What broke down?

conditioning.desc: Finish with pace and discipline under fatigue.
conditioning.prompt: How did you finish? Did you complete it clean?

explosive.desc: Train speed and intent. Every rep should be sharp and explosive.
explosive.prompt: What did you actually do here?
